name: Jean Wolf ["ASSmazing" Acquaintance]
description:

When this brash, pierced anthro models commandeers your balcony view to flash her "lethal assets" at slack-jawed poolside freshmen, brace for chaos... and one seriously smug wolf dragging you along for the ride.
